description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic construction with a dark, steel-like handle and a large, rectangular head adorned with ornate gold trim and decorative engravings. The head is blocky and symmetrical, with three prominent gold-framed panels on each side, each displaying an intricate emblem. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and tapers slightly toward the base, which is capped with a gold accent. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or fantasy sledgehammer, with a heavy, imposing appearance. The surface finish is smooth with a subtle metallic sheen, and the gold accents provide a striking contrast to the dark body. No visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments are present.
description: A large, ornate hammer with a dark metallic handle and a gold-trimmed, rectangular head featuring decorative engravings. The design is heavy, symmetrical, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, highlighting the three gold-framed decorative panels and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the front, showing the flat striking face and the cylindrical handle aligned behind it.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the same ornate gold-trimmed panels and the symmetrical design of the head.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back face of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical steel handle with a smooth surface and gold accent at the base.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with three gold-framed decorative panels on each side and flat striking faces.
